sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69422" key="musakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυσ-ακτέον</orth>, <sense id="n69422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must abominate</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f. l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> or <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:3:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.3.9</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐναίμως ἀκτέον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
